title: PROMETEO D2.1 - Report on the proposed probabilistic design framework and description of the application to case studies
author: Musumeci, Rosaria Ester
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: In this deliverable D2.1, the probabilistic calculation procedure developed within the PROMETEO project for assessing the performance of defense interventions is presented. The procedure is based on insights obtained from the critical review of existing design regulations documented in deliverable D1.1. Furthermore, the report discusses the results of applying this methodology to three Italian case studies, made possible through the research activities described in deliverables D3.1 and D4.1.
